privileged_info_summary: Task uses real, publicly available business data. Red Hat, Inc. is headquartered at 100 East Davie Street, Raleigh, NC 27601. IBM Corporation is headquartered at 1 New Orchard Road, Armonk, NY 10504. Arvind Krishna is Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of IBM (CEO since April 2020, Chairman since January 2021). Matt Hicks is President and Chief Executive Officer of Red Hat (appointed July 12, 2022). Red Hat was acquired by IBM on July 9, 2019 for $34 billion. All company addresses and executive information are from publicly available sources including company websites, SEC filings, and press releases.
